basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Sr. Project Scientist Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Candidates with Master of Pharmacy (M. Pharm) in Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs with 1 Year of Professional Experience. qualification can directly attend the interview on .

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Pharmacy (M. Pharm) in Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs with 1 Year of Professional Experience.
qualification.details: Master of Pharmacy (M. Pharm) in Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs 1 Year of Professional Experience in Regulatory Affairs (Pharmaceuticals & Medical Devices), Quality Management System (QMS), Medical Device Licensing and Compliance.

salary_details.details: Consolidated Pay-slab of Rs.56,000/-p.m. plus HRA @30%

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment is Sr. Project Scientist. This is a project-based role within the research field.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Pharmacy (M. Pharm) in Pharmaceutical Regulatory Affairs with at least 1 year of professional experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay-slab of Rs. 56,000/- per month plus HRA at 30%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview with the required documents on the specified date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Sr. Project Scientist position will be held on 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding this recruitment is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring their formal application, educational certificates, work experience details, and a recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job, offering an opportunity in the research field at IIT Delhi.
